# Etra: Names & Cultures — Fantasy ruler titles (Monarchy)
# Generated by generate_titles.py
#
# When game rule = Fantasy Languages and government = Monarchy,
# ruler titles (Emperor/King/Duke/Count) display in the
# ruler's culture/dialect language.
#
# Entries are added to country_flavor and evaluated before
# the base game's default entries (file loads first via 00_ prefix).

country_flavor = {
	type = country

	# === SPECIFIC DIALECT ENTRIES ===

	# --- ARDRAINIC ---
	# Ardrainic — Sittadellian
	text = {
		localization_key = etra_rank_empire_sittadellian
		trigger = {
			has_game_rule = etra_names_fantasy
			country_rank_is_empire = yes
			government_type = government_type:monarchy
			ruler ?= { culture.language = language:sittadellian_dialect }
		}
	}
	# Ardrainic — Sittadellian
	text = {
		localization_key = etra_rank_kingdom_sittadellian
		trigger = {
			has_game_rule = etra_names_fantasy
			country_rank_is_kingdom = yes
			government_type = government_type:monarchy
			ruler ?= { culture.language = language:sittadellian_dialect }
		}
	}
	# Ardrainic — Sittadellian
	text = {
		localization_key = etra_rank_duchy_sittadellian

			has_game_rule = etra_names_fantasy
			country_rank_is_duchy = yes
			government_type = government_type:monarchy
			ruler ?= { culture.language = language:sittadellian_dialect }
		}

		}

	# Torrent — Naurmen
	text = {
		localization_key = etra_rank_duchy_naurmen
		trigger = {
			has_game_rule = etra_names_fantasy
			country_rank_is_duchy = yes
			government_type = government_type:monarchy
			ruler ?= { culture.language = language:naurmen_dialect }
		}
	}
	# Torrent — Naurmen
	text = {
		localization_key = etra_rank_county_naurmen
		trigger = {
			has_game_rule = etra_names_fantasy
			country_rank_is_county = yes
			government_type = government_type:monarchy
			ruler ?= { culture.language = language:naurmen_dialect }
		}

			country_rank_is_empire = yes

			ruler ?= { culture = culture:aggeuios_culture }
		}

			country_rank_is_kingdom = yes

		}

		trigger = {
			has_game_rule = etra_names_fantasy
			country_rank_is_duchy = yes

			ruler ?= { culture = culture:aggeuios_culture }
		}

			country_rank_is_county = yes

			government_type = government_type:monarchy
			ruler ?= { culture.language = language:sordrenic_language }
		}
	}
	# Moran — Moran
	text = {
		localization_key = etra_rank_empire_moran
		trigger = {
			has_game_rule = etra_names_fantasy
			country_rank_is_empire = yes
			government_type = government_type:monarchy
			ruler ?= { culture.language = language:moran_language }
		}
	}
	# Moran — Moran (also: early_moran_dialect)
	text = {
		localization_key = etra_rank_empire_moran
		trigger = {
			has_game_rule = etra_names_fantasy
			country_rank_is_empire = yes
			government_type = government_type:monarchy
			ruler ?= { culture.language = language:early_moran_dialect }
		}
	}
	# Moran — Moran (also: late_moran_dialect)
	text = {
		localization_key = etra_rank_empire_moran
		trigger = {
			has_game_rule = etra_names_fantasy
			country_rank_is_empire = yes
			government_type = government_type:monarchy
			ruler ?= { culture.language = language:late_moran_dialect }
		}

			country_rank_is_empire = yes

		}
	}
	# Armonorican — Ebiam
	text = {
		localization_key = etra_rank_empire_ebiam
		trigger = {
			has_game_rule = etra_names_fantasy
			country_rank_is_empire = yes
			government_type = government_type:monarchy
			ruler ?= { culture.language = language:armonorican_dialect }
		}
	}
	# Armonorican — Ebiam
	text = {
		localization_key = etra_rank_kingdom_ebiam
		trigger = {
			has_game_rule = etra_names_fantasy
			country_rank_is_kingdom = yes
			government_type = government_type:monarchy
			ruler ?= { culture.language = language:armonorican_dialect }
		}
	}
	# Armonorican — Ebiam
	text = {
		localization_key = etra_rank_duchy_ebiam
		trigger = {
			has_game_rule = etra_names_fantasy
			country_rank_is_duchy = yes
			government_type = government_type:monarchy
			ruler ?= { culture.language = language:armonorican_dialect }
		}
	}
	# Armonorican — Ebiam
	text = {
		localization_key = etra_rank_county_ebiam
		trigger = {
			has_game_rule = etra_names_fantasy
			country_rank_is_county = yes
			government_type = government_type:monarchy
			ruler ?= { culture.language = language:armonorican_dialect }
		}
	}
	# Hravevi — Hravevi
	text = {
		localization_key = etra_rank_empire_hravevi
		trigger = {
			has_game_rule = etra_names_fantasy
			country_rank_is_empire = yes
			government_type = government_type:monarchy
			ruler ?= { culture.language = language:hravevi_language }
		}
	}
	# Hravevi — Hravevi
	text = {
		localization_key = etra_rank_kingdom_hravevi
		trigger = {
			has_game_rule = etra_names_fantasy
			country_rank_is_kingdom = yes
			government_type = government_type:monarchy
			ruler ?= { culture.language = language:hravevi_language }
		}
	}
	# Hravevi — Hravevi
	text = {
		localization_key = etra_rank_duchy_hravevi
		trigger = {
			has_game_rule = etra_names_fantasy
			country_rank_is_duchy = yes
			government_type = government_type:monarchy
			ruler ?= { culture.language = language:hravevi_language }
		}
	}
	# Hravevi — Hravevi
	text = {
		localization_key = etra_rank_county_hravevi
		trigger = {
			has_game_rule = etra_names_fantasy
			country_rank_is_county = yes
			government_type = government_type:monarchy
			ruler ?= { culture.language = language:hravevi_language }
		}
	}

}
